english: Savings is money you keep aside from your income.
twi: Sika sie yɛ sika a wode sie firi wo mfasoɛ mu.

english: A loan is money you borrow and pay back with interest.
twi: Sika bo yɛ sika a wohwɛ na wotua ka ne ho sika.

english: Mobile money lets you send and receive money with your phone.
twi: Momo de wo ho kwan ma wo sɛ wo de wo telefon tua sika na wanya sika.

english: A budget is a plan for how to spend your money.
twi: Sika nhyehyɛe yɛ nhyehyɛe a ɛkyerɛ sɛnea wobɛdi wo sika.
Sika a ɛba ho dɛn ne?

english: Interest is extra money paid on a loan or earned on savings.
twi: Sika a ɛba ho yɛ sika a wotua sɛ ka ho anaasɛ wanya firi sika sie mu.
